name: Jinling Pharmaceutical Company Limited
summary: Jinling Pharmaceutical Company Limited manufactures and sells pharmaceutical products in China. The company offers Mailuoning injection for the treatment of thrombo-occlusive vasculitis, arteriosclerotic occlusive disease, cerebral thrombosis and sequelae, multiple arteritis, acute arterial embolism of the limbs, diabetic gangrene, venous thrombosis, thrombophlebitis, etc.; ferrous succinate tablets for the prevention and treatment of iron deficiency anemia; and lentinan injection for treatment of malignant tumors. It also provides medical health care services. Jinling Pharmaceutical Company Limited is based in Nanjing, China.
